channel.title: Vista Theater Hollywood
channel.description: Now playing at Vista Theater Hollywood — 35mm and 70mm presentations.

item.title: The Odyssey
item.description:
After the Trojan War, Odysseus faces a dangerous voyage back to Ithaca, meeting creatures like the Cyclops Polyphemus, Sirens, and Calypso along the way.
Cast: Director: Christopher Nolan | Writers: Christopher Nolan | Stars: Matt Damon, Tom Holland, Anne Hathaway, Robert Pattinson, Lupita Nyong'o, Zendaya, Charlize Theron
Data: 2026
Durata: 172 minuti

Orari: July 24th Friday ore 10:00 am, July 24th Friday ore 2:30 pm, July 24th Friday ore 7:30 pm (Sold Out), July 25th Saturday ore 12:15 pm, July 25th Saturday ore 5:00 pm, July 25th Saturday ore 9:45 pm, July 26th Sunday ore 10:00 am, July 26th Sunday ore 2:30 pm, July 26th Sunday ore 7:15 pm, July 27th Monday ore 10:00 am, July 27th Monday ore 2:30 am, July 27th Monday ore 7:15 pm, July 28th Tuesday ore 10:00 am, July 28th Tuesday ore 2:30 pm, July 28th Tuesday ore 7:15 pm, July 29th Wednesday ore 10:00 am, July 29th Wednesday ore 2:30 pm, July 29th Wednesday ore 7:15 pm, July 30th Thursday ore 10:00 am, July 30th Thursday ore 2:30 pm, July 30th Thursday ore 7:15 pm, July 31st Friday ore 10:30 am, July 31st Friday ore 3:15 pm, July 31st Friday ore 7:30 pm, August 1st Saturday ore 1:30 pm, August 1st Saturday ore 6:30 pm, August 2nd Sunday ore 1:30 pm, August 2nd Sunday ore 6:30 pm, August 3rd Monday ore 3:00 pm, August 3rd Monday ore 7:15 pm, August 4th Tuesday ore 3:00 pm, August 4th Tuesday ore 7:15 pm, August 5th Wednesday ore 3:00 pm, August 5th Wednesday ore 7:15 pm, August 6th Thursday ore 10:00 am

item.title: The Old Fashioned Way
item.description:
The Great McGonigle and his troupe of third-rate vaudevillians manage to stay one step ahead of the bill collectors and the sheriff.
Cast: Director: William Beaudine | Writers: Garnett Weston, Jack Cunningham, W.C. Fields | Stars: W.C. Fields, Joe Morrison, Baby LeRoy
Data: 1934
Durata: 70 minuti

Orari: August 1st Saturday ore 10:00 am, August 2nd Sunday ore 10:00 am

item.title: Ice Cream Man
item.description:
An idyllic summer town descending into madness when a mysterious ice cream vendor serves sweet treats that turn local children into homicidal maniacs
Cast: Director: Eli Roth | Writers: Eli Roth, Noah Belson | Stars: Ari Millen, Charlie Zeltzer, Shiloh O'Reilly, Eli Roth
Data: 2026
Durata: 86 minuti

Orari: August 7th Friday ore 11:59 pm, August 8th Saturday ore 11:59 pm

item.title: The Dark Knight Rises
item.description:
Bane, an imposing terrorist, attacks Gotham City and disrupts its eight-year-long period of peace. This forces Bruce Wayne to come out of hiding and don the cape and cowl of Batman again.
Cast: Director: Christopher Nolan | Writers: Jonathan Nolan, Christopher Nolan, David S. Goyer | Stars: Christian Bale, Tom Hardy, Anne Hathaway
Data: 2012
Durata: 164 minuti

Orari: August 14th Friday ore 11:00 pm, August 15th Saturday ore 11:00 pm

item.title: Misbehaving Ladies
item.description:
A princess from Europe plays along when she is mistaken for a seamstress in her American hometown.
Cast: Director: William Beaudine | Writers: Juliet Wilbur Tompkins, Julien Josephson | Stars: Lila Lee, Ben Lyon, Louise Fazenda
Data: 1931
Durata: 75 minuti

Orari: August 15th Saturday ore 10:00 am, August 16th Sunday ore 10:00 am

item.title: The Fast and the Furious (25th Anniversary)
item.description:
Los Angeles street racer Dominic Toretto falls under the suspicion of the LAPD as a string of high-speed electronics truck robberies rocks the area. Brian O'Connor, an officer of the LAPD, joins the ranks of Toretto's highly skilled racing crew undercover to convict Toretto. However, O'Connor finds himself both enamored with this new world and in love with Toretto's sister, Mia. As a rival racing crew gains strength, O'Connor must decide where his loyalty really lies.
Cast: Director: Rob Cohen | Writers: Ken Li, Gary Scott Thompson, Erik Bergquist | Stars: Stars Vin Diesel Paul Walker Michelle Rodriguez
Data: 2001
Durata: 106 minuti

Orari: August 21st Friday ore 1:00 pm, August 21st Friday ore 4:15 pm, August 21st Friday ore 7:30 pm, August 22nd Saturday ore 1:15 pm, August 22nd Saturday ore 4:15 pm, August 22nd Saturday ore 7:30 pm, August 23rd Sunday ore 2:00 pm, August 23rd Sunday ore 7:00 pm, August 24th Monday ore 4:00 pm, August 24th Monday ore 7:30 pm, August 25th Tuesday ore 4:00 pm, August 25th Tuesday ore 7:30 pm, August 26th Wednesday ore 4:00 pm, August 26th Wednesday ore 7:30 pm, August 27th Thursday ore 4:00 pm, August 27th Thursday ore 7:30 pm

item.title: Child’s Play
item.description:
A dying serial killer transfers his consciousness into a popular kids doll using voodoo. A struggling single mother gifts her six-year-old son the much sought-after doll for his birthday, and the doll slowly begins to show its true colors.
Cast: Director: Tom Holland | Writers: Don Mancini, John Lafia, Tom Holland | Stars: Catherine Hicks, Chris Sarandon, Alex Vincent
Data: 1988
Durata: 87 minuti

Orari: August 21st Friday ore 11:59 pm, August 22nd Saturday ore 11:59 pm

item.title: The Crime of the Century
item.description:
A doctor who is also a "mentalist" confesses to a murder. The only problem is that the murder he's confessed to hasn't happened yet--although dead bodies are now starting to turn up all over the place. A reporter sets out to solve the "mystery".
Cast: Director: William Beaudine | Writers: Walter Maria Espe, Florence Ryerson, Brian Marlow | Stars: Jean Hersholt, Wynne Gibson, Stuart Erwin
Data: 1933
Durata: 73 minuti

Orari: August 22nd Saturday ore 10:00 am, August 23rd Sunday ore 10:00 am

item.title: Blonde Ransom
item.description:
A woman engineers a daring scheme to raise phony ransom payments and save her boyfriend's nightclub from criminals.
Cast: Director: William Beaudine | Writers: M. Coates Webster, Robert T. Shannon | Stars: Donald Cook, Virginia Grey, Pinky Lee
Data: 1945
Durata: 68 minuti

Orari: August 29th Saturday ore 10:00 am, August 30th Sunday ore 10:00 am
